en.what_is:
🩸 What is Menstruation?

Menstruation (or a period) is normal vaginal bleeding that occurs as part of a woman's monthly cycle. Every month, your body prepares for pregnancy. If no pregnancy occurs, the uterus sheds its lining. This is the menstrual blood.

It's completely normal and healthy!
en.why:
🌱 Why It Happens

During puberty, your brain signals your body to produce hormones. These hormones cause the ovaries to release an egg (ovulation) and thicken the uterus lining. If the egg isn't fertilized, the lining sheds as a period.
en.first:
📅 First Period Guide

Your first period (menarche) usually starts between ages 10 and 15. The blood might be red, brown, or even blackish. It's okay! Keep a pad in your bag just in case. Tell a trusted adult when it happens.
en.cycle:
🔄 Menstrual Cycle Basics

The cycle counts from the first day of one period to the first day of the next. The average cycle is 28 days, but anything from 21 to 35 days is normal. Periods usually last 3 to 7 days.
en.body:
🧍‍♀️ Body Changes During Puberty

You might notice:
- Breast growth
- Body hair in new places
- Changes in body shape
- Acne or oily skin
- Mood swings
All of this is your body growing into an adult!
en.pads:
🧴 How to Use Pads

1. Wash your hands.
2. Unwrap the pad.
3. Remove the backing paper.
4. Stick the sticky side to your underwear.
5. If it has wings, wrap them under the panties.
6. Wash your hands again.
en.change:
⏰ Change Pads Safely

Change your pad every 4 to 6 hours, even if it's not full. This prevents odor, bacteria growth, and infections. Always wash your hands before and after.
en.bathing:
🛁 Bathing & Cleanliness

Yes, you MUST bathe during your period! Warm water helps with cramps and keeps you clean. Wash your vulva (outside) with water only or mild unscented soap. Do NOT wash inside (douching) as it's harmful.
en.school:
🏫 School Tips

- Keep an 'emergency kit' (pads, fresh panties) in your bag.
- Drink plenty of water.
- Don't be afraid to ask to use the restroom.
- If you stain your uniform, tie a sweater around your waist and tell a teacher or nurse.
en.disposal:
🗑️ Disposal Tips

NEVER flush pads down the toilet! Roll the used pad up, wrap it in toilet paper or the wrapper of your new pad, and throw it in the trash bin.
en.mood:
🌪️ Mood Swings

Hormone changes can make you feel happy one minute and sad the next. This is normal. Take deep breaths, write in a journal, or talk to a friend.
en.anxiety:
😨 Anxiety & Fear

It's normal to feel scared about growing up or leaking. You are not alone! Millions of girls go through this. Being prepared with a pad helps reduce fear.
en.confidence:
✨ Confidence Boost

Your body is amazing and capable of incredible things. A period is a sign of health, not a weakness. Walk tall and proud!
en.self_accept:
🫂 Self Acceptance

Don't compare your body or your cycle to others. Everyone develops at their own pace. Love yourself just the way you are.
en.need_encourage:
💌 Encouragement

You are strong, capable, and beautiful! Whatever challenge you're facing today, you can handle it. Take it one step at a time.
en.exercise:
🏃‍♀️ Myth: You shouldn't exercise.
Fact: Light exercise like walking or stretching can actually reduce period cramps!
en.school_myth:
🏫 Myth: You should stay home from school.
Fact: You can absolutely go to school. Just bring your hygiene kit.
en.shameful:
🙈 Myth: Periods are dirty or shameful.
Fact: Periods are a natural, biological process that creates human life. There is NO shame in it.
en.bathe_myth:
🛁 Myth: You shouldn't wash your hair or bathe.
Fact: Bathing is essential for hygiene and helps soothe cramps.
en.late:
⏰ Why is my period late?

Periods can be late due to stress, weight changes, illness, or simply because your body is still adjusting to puberty. If it's very late and you are sexually active, please see a doctor.
en.odor:
🧼 Smelly Period

A slight odor is normal. However, a strong 'fishy' smell might be an infection or because a pad wasn't changed long enough. Change pads every 4-6 hours and wash with plain water.
en.heavy:
🩸 Heavy Flow

Heavy flow is when you soak through a pad every hour. It can be caused by hormones or iron deficiency. If you feel very weak or use too many pads, please speak to a doctor.
en.dizzy:
😵 Dizziness

Dizziness can happen because of iron loss or drops in blood sugar. Drink plenty of water and eat iron-rich foods like spinach, beans, or meat.
en.cold_water:
🧊 Cold Water Myth

Drinking cold water does NOT stop or affect your period flow. This is a myth. You can drink water at any temperature you like!
en.okra:
🥗 Okra Myth

Eating okra is perfectly safe during your period. It does not make the flow 'slimy' or cause any harm. It's actually a healthy vegetable!
en.dos_donts:
✅ Dos and Don'ts

DO: Change pads often, drink water, and rest. DON'T: Use scented soaps inside, skip meals, or feel ashamed. Your period is natural!
en.food:
🍎 Food Tips

EAT: Iron-rich foods (beans, greens), fruits, and water. AVOID: Too much salt (causes bloating), caffeine, or very sugary snacks if they make you feel sluggish.
en.ovulation:
🥚 Ovulation

Ovulation is when your ovary releases an egg. It usually happens in the middle of your cycle. This is the time when a woman is most likely to get pregnant if she has sex.
en.discharge:
💧 Vaginal Discharge

Clear or white discharge is normal and keeps the vagina clean. If it becomes green, yellow, grey, or very itchy, it might be an infection, and you should see a doctor.
en.itching:
🧴 Itching Down There

Itching can be caused by soap, tight clothes, or an infection like a yeast infection. Avoid using scented soaps. If it doesn't stop, talk to a nurse or doctor.
en.swimming:
🏊‍♀️ Swimming

Yes, you can swim! But pads don't work in water. You would need to use a tampon or a menstrual cup. If you only have pads, it's better to wait until after your swim.
en.tampons:
🩹 Tampons

A tampon is a cotton plug you insert into the vagina to soak up blood. It's safe and won't get lost inside. Change it every 4-8 hours.
en.cup:
🏆 Menstrual Cup

A menstrual cup is a reusable silicone cup that catches blood. It's eco-friendly and can be worn for up to 12 hours. It takes a little practice to use!
en.pregnancy:
🤰 How Pregnancy Happens

Pregnancy occurs when a man's sperm meets a woman's egg. This usually happens during unprotected sex. A missed period is often the first sign of pregnancy.
en.pimples:
✨ Period Acne

Hormonal changes can make your skin oily, leading to pimples. Wash your face gently twice a day and try not to squeeze them!
en.breast_pain:
🍈 Breast Soreness

It's very common for breasts to feel tender or swollen just before or during your period. This is caused by hormones and is perfectly normal.
en.sleep:
😴 Feeling Sleepy

Your body uses a lot of energy during your period. It's okay to feel more tired than usual. Listen to your body and get extra rest!
en.weight:
⚖️ Weight Changes

You might feel 'fat' or heavier during your period. This is usually just water retention (bloating). It goes away once your period ends.
en.no_period:
⏳ No Period Yet?

Most girls start between ages 10-15. If you are 16 and haven't started, don't worry, but it's a good idea to see a doctor for a check-up.
en.pcos:
🩺 PCOS

Polycystic Ovary Syndrome (PCOS) is a common hormonal condition that can cause irregular periods or acne. A doctor can help you manage it with medicine or diet.
en.endo:
😖 Extreme Pain (Endometriosis)

If your period pain is so bad that you can't go to school or walk, it's not normal. You might have endometriosis. Please tell a doctor so they can help.
en.stains:
🧼 Cleaning Stains

Accidents happen! To remove blood, soak the cloth in COLD water and use soap. Never use hot water first, as it 'cooks' the stain into the fabric.
en.hormones:
🧪 What are Hormones?

Hormones are chemical messengers in your body. They control when you start puberty, your menstrual cycle, and even your moods!
en.anger:
😡 Feeling Angry

Irritability is a common part of PMS. If you feel like snapping at everyone, try taking deep breaths or going for a short walk to clear your head.
en.healthy_rel:
❤️ Healthy Relationships

A healthy relationship is based on respect, honesty, and support. You should always feel safe and valued by the people you are with.
en.consent:
🤝 Consent

Consent means saying 'Yes' clearly and freely. Both people must agree to any physical contact. It's okay to say 'No' at any time.
en.anatomy:
🗺️ Body Anatomy

Menstrual blood comes from the uterus (womb), passes through the cervix, and comes out through the vagina. It does NOT come from the place where you urinate (pee).
en.two_periods:
✌️ Two Periods in a Month?

For some girls, the cycle is short or irregular, making it seem like two periods. This is common in the first few years. If it happens every month, see a doctor.
en.long_period:
📅 Long Periods

A normal period lasts 3-7 days. If yours always lasts more than 8 days or is very heavy, talk to a health worker to check your iron levels.
en.tracking:
📱 Period Tracking

Marking the first day of your period on a calendar helps you predict when the next one is coming. This helps you be prepared with pads!
en.clots:
🩸 Blood Clots

Small blood clots (like jelly) are normal during a period. If they are very large (bigger than a coin) and happen often, you should check with a doctor.
en.sex_period:
👩‍❤️‍👨 Sex During Period

Yes, it is medically safe to have sex during your period if both partners agree. Some find it messy, while others find it helps with cramps. Remember: you can still get pregnant!
en.pregnancy_test:
🧪 Pregnancy Test Timing

The best time to take a test is a few days after your period was supposed to start. Testing too early can give a false result.
en.menopause:
🌅 Menopause

Menopause is when a woman's periods stop forever, usually between ages 45-55. It happens when the body stops releasing eggs.
en.clot_why:
🩸 Why do I have clots?

Clots happen when the blood sits for a while before coming out. It's usually fine, but if you soak pads too fast, tell a doctor.
en.pmdd:
🌪️ Extreme Moods (PMDD)

If your mood swings make you feel very depressed or unable to function, it might be PMDD. This is a severe form of PMS that needs medical help.
en.pads_vs_tampons:
🧴 Pads vs Tampons

Pads are worn outside the body, while tampons go inside. Both are safe! It just depends on what makes you feel most comfortable.
en.birth_control:
💊 Birth Control & Periods

Some birth control (like the pill or IUD) can make periods lighter, shorter, or even stop them completely. This is usually safe and managed by a doctor.

pidgin.what_is:
🩸 Wetin be Menstruation?

Menstruation (or period) na normal blood wey dey commot from woman body every month. Every month, your body dey prepare for pikin. If pikin no dey, the body go flush the preparation commot. Na normal and healthy thing!
pidgin.why:
🌱 Why E Dey Happen

As you dey grow, your body go start to produce hormones. These hormones go make your body release egg. If the egg no turn pikin, your body go shed blood as period.
pidgin.first:
📅 First Period Guide

Your first period dey always start between 10 to 15 years. The blood fit be red, brown, or black. E no mean anything! Just carry pad for bag. Tell your mama or adult wey you trust.
pidgin.cycle:
🔄 Menstrual Cycle Basics

The cycle na from the first day of one period to the first day of another one. Normal one na 28 days, but 21 to 35 days still dey normal. E fit last 3 to 7 days.
pidgin.body:
🧍‍♀️ Body Changes For Puberty

You fit notice:
- Breast go dey grow
- Hair for armpit and private part
- Body shape go change
- Pimples fit commot
- Your mood fit dey change change
All this one mean say you dey grow!
pidgin.pads:
🧴 How to Use Pads

1. Wash your hands.
2. Open the pad.
3. Commot the paper for back.
4. Stick am for your pant.
5. If e get wings, wrap am well.
6. Wash your hands again.
pidgin.change:
⏰ Change Pads Safely

Change your pad every 4 to 6 hours, even if blood no full am. This one go stop smell and infection. Always wash your hand.
pidgin.bathing:
🛁 Bathing & Cleanliness

Yes, you MUST bathe! Warm water dey help for pain. Wash your private part outside with only water or mild soap. No wash inside!
pidgin.school:
🏫 School Tips

- Carry your pad and extra pant for bag.
- Drink water well well.
- No fear to ask for toilet break.
- If blood stain your cloth, tie sweater for waist and tell teacher.
pidgin.disposal:
🗑️ How to Throw Pad

NO FLUSH PAD FOR TOILET! Roll am well, wrap am with paper, then throw am inside dustbin.
pidgin.mood:
🌪️ Mood Swings

Hormones fit make you happy now, and sad later. E normal. Just relax, or talk to friend.
pidgin.anxiety:
😨 Anxiety & Fear

E normal to fear. But you no dey alone! Carry your pad everywhere, the fear go reduce.
pidgin.confidence:
✨ Confidence Boost

Your body dey do wonders. Period show say you dey healthy. Hold your head up!
pidgin.self_accept:
🫂 Self Acceptance

No compare yourself with another person. Everybody body different. Love yourself.
pidgin.need_encourage:
💌 I Need Encouragement

You are strong and beautiful! You fit do anything wey you set your mind to do.
pidgin.exercise:
🏃‍♀️ Myth: You no suppose exercise.
Fact: Light exercise like walking fit stop period pain!
pidgin.school_myth:
🏫 Myth: You no suppose go school.
Fact: You fit go school! Just carry your pad.
pidgin.shameful:
🙈 Myth: Period na dirty thing.
Fact: Period na normal biological thing. No shame dey inside.
pidgin.bathe_myth:
🛁 Myth: You no suppose bathe.
Fact: Bathing dey very important for hygiene.
pidgin.late:
⏰ Why my period late?

Period fit late because of stress, if you lose weight, or if you sick. Your body fit still dey adjust. If e late well well, see doctor.
pidgin.odor:
🧼 Smelly Period

Small smell dey normal. But if e smell well well, fit be infection or you no change pad quick. Change pad every 4-6 hours and wash with only water.
pidgin.heavy:
🩸 Heavy Flow

Heavy flow na when you dey soak pad every one hour. E fit be hormone or iron problem. If you weak well well, go see doctor.
pidgin.dizzy:
😵 Dizziness

Dizziness fit happen because you dey lose iron or your sugar low. Drink plenty water and chop food wey get iron like pumpkin leaf or meat.
pidgin.cold_water:
🧊 Cold Water Myth

To drink cold water NO dey stop period. Na lie! You fit drink any water wey you like.
pidgin.okra:
🥗 Okra Myth

To chop okra dey very safe when you dey period. E no go make blood draw or do you anything. Na healthy vegetable.
pidgin.dos_donts:
✅ Wetin to do and wetin no to do

DO: Change pad quick, drink water, and rest. DON'T: Use soap for inside, skip food, or feel shame. Period na natural thing!
pidgin.food:
🍎 Food Tips

CHOP: Food wey get iron (beans, leaf), fruit, and water. NO CHOP: Too much salt, or too much sugar if e dey make you weak.
pidgin.ovulation:
🥚 Ovulation

Ovulation na when your body release egg. E dey happen for middle of your cycle. Na this time woman fit carry pikin easy pass.
pidgin.discharge:
💧 Vaginal Discharge

Water wey dey commot for your private part dey normal. But if e change color to green or yellow, go see doctor.
pidgin.itching:
🧴 If E Dey Itch

If your private part dey itch, fit be the soap you dey use or small infection. No use soap for inside. If e no stop, go see nurse.
pidgin.swimming:
🏊‍♀️ To Swim

Yes, you fit swim! But pad no go work for water. You need tampon or cup. If you no get those ones, better make you wait.
pidgin.tampons:
🩹 Tampons

Tampon na small cotton wey you go put inside to soak blood. E safe and e no fit lost for inside. Change am every 4-8 hours.
pidgin.cup:
🏆 Menstrual Cup

Menstrual cup na silicone cup wey you fit use again and again. E dey catch blood and you fit wear am for 12 hours.
pidgin.pregnancy:
🤰 How Pikin Dey Happen

Pikin dey happen when man and woman do unprotected sex. If you no see your period, na the first sign.
pidgin.pimples:
✨ Period Pimples

Hormones fit make your face get oil and pimples. Wash your face well twice a day.
pidgin.breast_pain:
🍈 Breast Pain

E common say your breast go dey pain you before or during period. Na hormones dey cause am.
pidgin.sleep:
😴 If Sleep Dey Catch You

Your body dey do big work for period time. If you tired, just rest.
pidgin.weight:
⚖️ Weight Change

You fit feel say you fat during period. Na water wey your body hold. E go go after the period finish.
pidgin.no_period:
⏳ If You Never Start

Girls dey start between 10-15 years. If you don reach 16 and you never start, go see doctor.
pidgin.pcos:
🩺 PCOS

PCOS na hormone problem wey fit make your period no dey come well. Doctor fit help you manage am.
pidgin.endo:
😖 Heavy Pain

If period pain too much say you no fit waka or go school, no keep quiet. Tell doctor.
pidgin.stains:
🧼 How to Clean Blood

If blood stain your cloth, use COLD water and soap quick quick.
pidgin.hormones:
🧪 Wetin be Hormones?

Hormones na messengers for your body. Na dem dey control your growth, your period, and how you dey feel.
pidgin.anger:
😡 To Dey Vex

PMS fit make you dey vex for everybody. Just take deep breath or go walk small.
pidgin.healthy_rel:
❤️ Good Relationship

Better relationship na the one wey respect and trust dey inside. You suppose feel safe.
pidgin.consent:
🤝 Consent

Consent na when you say 'Yes' with all your mind. Two people must agree.
pidgin.anatomy:
🗺️ Body Parts

Blood dey commot from your womb. E no dey commot where you dey shishi (pee).
pidgin.two_periods:
✌️ Two Periods For One Month?

If your cycle short, fit be like say you see period twice. E common for young girls.
pidgin.long_period:
📅 Long Period

Normal period na 3-7 days. If your own pass 8 days every time, go talk to doctor.
pidgin.tracking:
📱 How to Track

Dey mark the first day for calendar. This one go help you prepare.
pidgin.clots:
🩸 Blood Clots

Small jelly jini dey normal. But if dem too big pass coin, go see doctor.
pidgin.sex_period:
👩‍❤️‍👨 Sex During Period

Yes, e safe if two people agree. Some say e dey help for pain. But remember: you fit still carry pikin!
pidgin.pregnancy_test:
🧪 Pregnancy Test

Best time to check na few days after the period suppose start. If you check too early, e fit give wrong result.
pidgin.menopause:
🌅 Menopause

Menopause na when period stop for life, usually between 45-55 years.
pidgin.clot_why:
🩸 Why I get clots?

Clots dey happen when blood stay one place before e commot. Normally no problem, but if you soak pad fast fast, tell doctor.
pidgin.pmdd:
🌪️ Extreme Moods (PMDD)

If mood swing too strong say you no fit function, fit be PMDD. Go see doctor for help.
pidgin.pads_vs_tampons:
🧴 Pads vs Tampons

Pad na for outside, tampon na for inside. Both of dem safe! Use the one wey you like pass.
pidgin.birth_control:
💊 Birth Control

Some medicine fit make period light or stop am. E safe and doctor go guide you.

ha.what_is:
🩸 Menene Haila?

Haila al'ada ce ta jini da ke zuwa wa mace kowane wata. Jikinki yana shirya wa daukar ciki kowane wata, idan ba ciki, sai mahaifa ta zubar da jinin.
ha.why:
🌱 Me yasa yake faruwa

A lokacin balaga, kwakwalwa tana tura sakon hormones don fitar da kwai. Idan ba a samu ciki ba, sai a yi haila.
ha.first:
📅 Jagorar Hailar Farko

Ana fara haila tsakanin shekara 10 zuwa 15. Jinin na iya zama ja, ruwan kasa, ko baki. Hakan daidai ne! Sanar da babba idan kika gani.
ha.cycle:
🔄 Sadarwar Haila

Ana kirgawa daga ranar farko ta haila zuwa wata hailar. Yawanci kwanaki 28 ne.
ha.body:
🧍‍♀️ Canje-canjen Jiki

Za ki ga:
- Girman nono
- Gashi a wasu sassan jiki
- Canjin siffar jiki
- Kuraje
- Canjin yanayi
ha.pads:
🧴 Yadda ake amfani da pad

1. Wanke hannu.
2. Bude pad.
3. Cire takardar baya.
4. Manna a jikin pant din ki.
5. Wanke hannu.
ha.change:
⏰ Canza pad lafiya

Canza pad bayan awa 4 zuwa 6 don kauce wa kwayoyin cuta da wari.
ha.bathing:
🛁 Wanka da Tsafta

Ki rika wanka! Ruwan dumi na taimakawa wajen rage radadi. Wanke wajen gaba da ruwa kawai.
ha.school:
🏫 Makarantar da Haila

- Rike pad a jaka.
- Sha ruwa sosai.
- Kada ki ji kunyar zuwa ban daki.
ha.disposal:
🗑️ Zubar da pad

Kada ki jefa pad a bayan gari. Nade shi da takarda ki jefa a kwandon shara.
ha.mood:
🌪️ Canjin Yanayi

Canjin hormones na iya sa ki farin ciki ko bacin rai ba gaira ba dalili. Hakan daidai ne.
ha.anxiety:
😨 Tsoro da fargaba

Kada ki ji tsoro, dukkan mata na fuskantar wannan.
ha.confidence:
✨ Kwarin Gwiwa

Jikinki abin alfahari ne. Haila alama ce ta koshin lafiya.
ha.self_accept:
🫂 Yarda da Kai

Kada ki gwada kanki da wata, kowa da irin jikinsa.
ha.need_encourage:
💌 Karfafa Gwiwa

Ke jaruma ce mai karfi! Zaki iya cin nasara a komai.
ha.exercise:
🏃‍♀️ Karya: Kada ki motsa jiki.
Gaskiya: Motsa jiki na rage radadin haila!
ha.school_myth:
🏫 Karya: Kada ki je makaranta.
Gaskiya: Zaki iya zuwa makaranta lafiya lau.
ha.shameful:
🙈 Karya: Haila abin kunya ne.
Gaskiya: Haila al'ada ce ta halitta, babu abin kunya.
ha.bathe_myth:
🛁 Karya: Kada ki yi wanka.
Gaskiya: Wanka yana da matukar muhimmanci.
ha.late:
⏰ Me yasa haila ta makara?

Haila na iya yin jinkiri saboda damuwa, rashin lafiya, ko kuma jikinki har yanzu yana kokarin daidaitawa. Idan jinkirin ya yi yawa, gara ki ga likita.
ha.odor:
🧼 Warin Haila

Wari kadan ba komai bane. Amma idan warin ya yi yawa, yana iya zama alamar sanyi ko kuma rashin canza pad akai-akai. Canza pad duk bayan awa 4-6.
ha.heavy:
🩸 Jini Mai Yawa

Jini mai yawa shine wanda kike jike pad kowane awa daya. Yana iya zama alamar rashin jini ko matsalar hormones. Gara ki ga likita idan kina jin jiri.
ha.dizzy:
😵 Jiri Lokacin Haila

Jiri na iya faruwa saboda rashin jini ko ruwa a jiki. Sha ruwa sosai kuma ki ci abinci mai gina jiki kamar ganye da wake.
ha.cold_water:
🧊 Shan Ruwan Sanyi

Shan ruwan sanyi BA ya tsayar da haila. Wannan karya ce. Zaki iya shan ruwa a kowane yanayi kike so.
ha.okra:
🥗 Cin Ku6ewa

Cin ku6ewa ba shi da wata matsala lokacin haila. Ba ya sa jini ya rincike ko wata matsala. Abinci ne mai kyau.
ha.dos_donts:
✅ Abin yi da Abin ki

ABIN YI: Canza pad akai-akai, sha ruwa, ki huta. ABIN KI: Kada ki wanke gabanki da sabulu, kada ki ki cin abinci.
ha.food:
🍎 Abinci da Haila

CI: Abinci mai jini (wake, ganye), 'ya'yan itace, da ruwa. KI: Gishiri da yawa, ko sukari mai yawa idan yana sa ki kasala.
ha.ovulation:
🥚 Kwai (Ovulation)

Fitar kwai shine lokacin da kwan mace ya fito don samun ciki. Yana faruwa a tsakiyar sadarwar haila.
ha.discharge:
💧 Ruwan Gaba

Fitar farin ruwa daidai ne, yana sa gaba ya zama mai tsafta. Amma idan ya koma ja ko kore, gara ki ga likita.
ha.itching:
🧴 Kai Kayin Gaba

Zai iya zama saboda sabulu ko sanyi. Kada ki yi amfani da sabulu mai kamshi wajen wanke gabanki.
ha.swimming:
🏊‍♀️ Yin Iyo

Eh, zaki iya iyo! Amma pad ba ya aiki a ruwa. Sai kin yi amfani da tampon ko cup.
ha.tampons:
🩹 Tampons

Tampon wani auduga ne da ake sakawa a gaba don tsayar da jini. Yana da kyau kuma baya bace wa a ciki.
ha.cup:
🏆 Menstrual Cup

Kofin haila ne da ake sakawa don tara jini. Ana iya wanke shi a sake amfani dashi.
ha.pregnancy:
🤰 Samun Juna Biyu

Ciki yana faruwa ne idan kwan mace ya hadu da na miji. Rashin haila shine alamar farko.
ha.pimples:
✨ Kurajen Fuska

Canjin hormones na iya sa fuska ta fitar da kuraje. Ki wanke fuskarki sau biyu a rana.
ha.breast_pain:
🍈 Ciwon Nono

Al'ada ne nono ya yi ciwo kafin haila ko lokacin haila saboda hormones.
ha.sleep:
😴 Gajiya da Bacci

Jikinki yana aiki sosai lokacin haila. Ba komai bane idan kin ji baccin ya karu.
ha.weight:
⚖️ Nauyin Jiki

Kuna iya jin jikinku ya yi nauyi lokacin haila saboda ruwa da jiki ke tarawa. Zai wuce bayan haila.
ha.no_period:
⏳ Idan Ba a Fara Ba

Yan mata na farawa tsakanin shekara 10-15. Idan kin kai 16 ba ki fara ba, ga likita ya duba ki.
ha.pcos:
🩺 PCOS

Wata matsala ce ta hormones da ke sa haila ta rincike. Likita zai iya taimaka miki.
ha.endo:
😖 Radadi Mai Yawa

Idan ciwon haila ya hana ki waka ko zuwa makaranta, gara ki ga likita domin ba daidai ba ne.
ha.stains:
🧼 Wanke Jini

Idan jini ya taba kaya, ki wanke da RUWAN SANYI da sabulu. Kada ki sa ruwan zafi.
ha.hormones:
🧪 Menene Hormones?

Su ne mannyan sako a jikinki da ke kula da balaga da hailarki.
ha.anger:
😡 Bacin Rai

PMS na sa bacin rai farat daya. Ki gwada yin dogon numfashi don kwantar da hankali.
ha.healthy_rel:
❤️ Dangantaka Mai Kyau

Dangantaka mai kyau ita ce wadda take da girmamawa da amana.
ha.consent:
🤝 Izini (Consent)

Izini shine yarjejeniya tsakanin mutum biyu kafin wani abu ya faru.
ha.anatomy:
🗺️ Sassan Jiki

Jinin haila yana fitowa ne daga mahaifa ta bakin mahaifa zuwa gaba.
ha.two_periods:
✌️ Haila Sau Biyu a Wata?

Al'ada ne ga yan mata da suka fara yi, haila ta rincike har ta zo sau biyu. Idan ya dade, ga likita.
ha.long_period:
📅 Hailar da Ta Dade

Haila na kwanaki 3-7 ne. Idan ta wuce 8 kowane wata, ga likita ya duba ki.
ha.tracking:
📱 Bibiyar Haila

Rubuta ranar da kika fara haila yana taimaka miki sanin yaushe ce ta gaba za ta zo.
ha.clots:
🩸 Dunƙulen Jini

Dunƙulen jini kaɗan daidai ne. Amma idan ya yi girma sosai, gara a ga likita.
ha.sex_period:
👩‍❤️‍👨 Jima'i Lokacin Haila

Eh, yana da kyau idan ma'aurata sun amince. Amma ki sani cewa har yanzu ana iya samun ciki!
ha.pregnancy_test:
🧪 Gwajin Ciki

Lokaci mafi kyau shine bayan yan kwanaki da hailarki ta ki zuwa.
ha.menopause:
🌅 Dakatawar Haila

Shine lokacin da mace ta daina haila gaba daya, yawanci tsakanin shekara 45-55.
ha.clot_why:
🩸 Me yasa jini ke dunkulewa?

Yana faruwa idan jinin ya dade a ciki kafin ya fito. Idan jinin ya yi yawa sosai, ga likita.
ha.pmdd:
🌪️ Canjin Yanayi Mai Tsanani

Idan canjin yanayi ya hana ki komai, yana iya zama PMDD. Ga likita don neman taimako.
ha.pads_vs_tampons:
🧴 Pad ko Tampon

Pad na waje ne, Tampon kuma na ciki. Dukkansu suna da kyau, ki zabi wanda kika fi so.
ha.birth_control:
💊 Maganin Tsarin Iyali

Wasu magungunan na iya sa haila ta ragu ko ta tsaya. Wannan daidai ne a karkashin kulawar likita.
